info.title: Etqan API (Mobile)
info.description: Endpoints لتطبيق المريض — متوافقة مع شاشات Figma (رئيسية، تغذية، تمارين، تقدم، مجتمع، ملف، إشعارات، دكتور، إلخ). لا يشمل لوحة الأدمن أو مسارات الدكتور لإدارة المرضى/الخطط. Full API + Admin: `/api-docs-admin`

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Register, Login

tags.name: OTP
tags.description: Verify & Resend OTP

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Current user (authenticated)

tags.name: Profiles
tags.description: User profile data

tags.name: Doctors
tags.description: List & get doctors

tags.name: Community
tags.description: Posts, comments, likes, shares, follow

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Chat between patient and assigned doctor

tags.name: Channels
tags.description: Group chat channels (admin creates, users/doctors send)

tags.name: Meals
tags.description: الوجبات: قائمة، إضافة، تسجيل أكل، إحصائيات (أدمن/دكتور يضيف)

tags.name: Nutrition Plan
tags.description: خطة التغذية الأسبوعية من الدكتور للعميل

tags.name: Exercises
tags.description: التمارين الأساسية + متطلبات المعدات (أدمن/دكتور يضيف، الجميع يشوف)

tags.name: Workout Plan
tags.description: الخطة الأسبوعية للتمارين (الدكتور يحدد لكل يوم قالب)

tags.name: Workout Sessions
tags.description: جلسات التمرين: بدء، إكمال مجموعة (تسجيل العدات)، إنهاء

tags.name: Measurements
tags.description: قياسات الجسم (وزن، دهون، عضلات، ماء، خصر) — Progress / Add Measurement

tags.name: Referrals
tags.description: الإحالات: كود المستخدم، عدد الأصدقاء، الخصم المكتسب

tags.name: Subscription
tags.description: Premium: حالة الاشتراك، ترقية، تطبيق خصم الإحالة

tags.name: Banners
tags.description: Banners: public list + admin CRUD

tags.name: Grocery
tags.description: قائمة البقالة (Grocery List)

tags.name: Doctor Notes
tags.description: ملاحظة/مراجعة من الدكتور للمريض (Note from your Doctor)

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: الصفحة الرئيسية: مقاييس، التزام، هدف، ملخص اليوم، ملاحظة الدكتور

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: User notifications (list / unread / mark read)

tags.name: Upload
tags.description: Upload image (multipart/form-data)

bearerAuth.description: JWT من POST /auth/login — استخدم زر Authorize وأدخل: Bearer <token>

401.description: Invalid credentials or email not verified

get.summary: Doctor: workout sessions for assigned patient
Doctor: measurements list for assigned patient
Doctor: aggregated stats for an assigned patient (counts + baseline/goal progress)

404.description: Patient not found or not assigned to this doctor

post.summary: Doctor: create or reopen 1:1 conversation with assigned patient

200.description: Conversation payload (same as chat list items)

get.summary: Doctor: full patient record (assigned only) — profile + stats + measurementProgress

200.description: items, total, page, limit; each post has author, likesCount, commentsCount, sharesCount, liked (if auth)

get.summary: My conversations (patient: one with doctor; doctor: all with patients)
Get or create my conversation with my doctor (patient only)
Get conversation by id (must be participant)
List channel messages (USER with Premium, DOCTOR, ADMIN)

post.summary: Send message to channel (USER with Premium, DOCTOR, ADMIN)
Log meal as eaten (mark as eaten)

userWeeklyPlanDayId.description: ID of the plan day to start (must have an exercise)

200.description: current, start, targetWeight (from profile), changes (weight/bodyFat/muscleMass/water), chartData[]

get.summary: Progress summary using baseline + latest measurement + goal (with progressPercent)
My referral status (code, friends joined, discount earned)
My subscription (plan, endsAt, discount to apply)

post.summary: Upgrade to Premium (by packageId or durationMonths)
Apply referral discount on renewal (resets discount)

get.summary: Latest note from my doctor (or last chat message if no note)
Home dashboard: body composition, weekly adherence (nutrition + workouts), goal progress, today summary, doctor note

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional calendar day for “today” (server-local TZ). Prefer ISO date only `YYYY-MM-DD` — avoids UTC shifts in responses.

200.description: bodyComposition (current, changes), weeklyAdherence: nutrition (plan, days), workouts (percent, plan id/weekStart/weekEnd/doctor, days[] with exercise + sets/reps + completed, completedDays, totalDays), goalProgress, todaySummary, doctorNote
Returns { url: absolute https URL } when PUBLIC_BASE_URL or Host is known; otherwise relative /uploads/<file>
